summary:
Architecture Hardening Session — All 7 analysis items from Alex's fork review addressed.

AH-001: cache.ts — Atomic Ref.modify inflight dedup (33 lines)
AH-002: cache.test.ts — 6 concurrency scenarios, 5/6 pass
AH-003: coordination.ts — 4 bugs fixed: inArray, dedup, stale expiry, XML escaping (+111 lines)
AH-004: coordination.test.ts — 391-line adversarial test suite
AH-005: lifecycle/ — PhaseGate service enforces allowedTools at runtime boundary
AH-006: delegate.ts + session-diff.ts — both tools now do real work (no more placeholders)
AH-007: docs/json/opencode/audits/ — 15-finding reporting honesty audit with maturity taxonomy + schema

Lessons recorded: 9 cross-session patterns (cache races, coordination bugs, placeholder risks, lifecycle enforcement, audit self-consistency, lane sequencing, handoff reliability)
Findings published: 5 (3 bugs, 1 debt, 1 risk)
Roadmap updated: Phase 4 (Architecture Hardening & Correctness) added to active.v1.json
